Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class OrgLifecycleNotification

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.OrgLifecycleNotification
public class OrgLifecycleNotification extends SObject

Java class for OrgLifecycleNotification complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="OrgLifecycleNotification">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventUuid" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LifecycleRequestId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LifecycleRequestType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OrgId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReplayId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StatusCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
